description: Product analytics from ClickHouse events_v2 — activity by hour/weekday, daily DAU, module and user breakdowns, economics, cohorts (new vs returning), payload/chat health, error mix. All calendar logic in UTC. Lower section adds bar/time-series companions for major tables.

targets.rawSql: SELECT count() AS events FROM cazinoshiz.events_v2 WHERE project = 'cazinoshiz' AND $__timeFilter(created_at)
SELECT uniqExact(user_id) AS users FROM cazinoshiz.events_v2 WHERE project = 'cazinoshiz' AND user_id > 0 AND $__timeFilter(created_at)

panels.description: Among rows with user_id > 0.

targets.rawSql: SELECT if(uniqExact(user_id) = 0, 0, round(count() / uniqExact(user_id), 2)) AS avg_events_per_user FROM cazinoshiz.events_v2 WHERE project = 'cazinoshiz' AND user_id > 0 AND $__timeFilter(created_at)

panels.description: Sums the selected time range into 24 hour buckets (server/UTC).

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  concat(lpad(toString(h), 2, '0'), ':00') AS hour_label,
  toFloat64(coalesce(e, 0)) AS events
FROM (SELECT arrayJoin(range(24)) AS h) AS hours
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT toHour(created_at) AS h, count() AS e
  FROM cazinoshiz.events_v2
  WHERE project = 'cazinoshiz' AND $__timeFilter(created_at)
  GROUP BY h
) AS t USING (h)
ORDER BY h

panels.title: Events by hour of day

panels.description: Per-hour unique users and intensity.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  toHour(created_at) AS hour_utc,
  count() AS events,
  uniqExactIf(user_id, user_id > 0) AS users,
  round(count() / greatest(uniqExactIf(user_id, user_id > 0), 1), 1) AS events_per_user
FROM cazinoshiz.events_v2
WHERE project = 'cazinoshiz' AND $__timeFilter(created_at)
GROUP BY hour_utc
ORDER BY hour_utc

panels.title: Hour detail

panels.description: Monday–Sunday using UTC dates. Missing weekdays show 0.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  multiIf(dow = 1, 'Mon', dow = 2, 'Tue', dow = 3, 'Wed', dow = 4, 'Thu', dow = 5, 'Fri', dow = 6, 'Sat', 'Sun') AS day_name,
  toFloat64(coalesce(e, 0)) AS events
FROM (SELECT arrayJoin([1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7]) AS dow) AS d
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT toDayOfWeek(created_at, 0, 'UTC') AS dow, count() AS e
  FROM cazinoshiz.events_v2
  WHERE project = 'cazinoshiz' AND $__timeFilter(created_at)
  GROUP BY dow
) AS t USING (dow)
ORDER BY dow

panels.title: Events by weekday

targets.rawSql:
WITH tot AS (SELECT count() AS t FROM cazinoshiz.events_v2 WHERE project = 'cazinoshiz' AND $__timeFilter(created_at))
SELECT
  multiIf(dow = 1, 'Mon', dow = 2, 'Tue', dow = 3, 'Wed', dow = 4, 'Thu', dow = 5, 'Fri', dow = 6, 'Sat', 'Sun') AS day_name,
  coalesce(e, 0) AS events,
  coalesce(u, 0) AS users,
  round(coalesce(e, 0) / greatest((SELECT t FROM tot), 1), 4) AS events_pct
FROM (SELECT arrayJoin([1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7]) AS dow) AS d
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT
    toDayOfWeek(created_at, 0, 'UTC') AS dow,
    count() AS e,
    uniqExactIf(user_id, user_id > 0) AS u
  FROM cazinoshiz.events_v2
  WHERE project = 'cazinoshiz' AND $__timeFilter(created_at)
  GROUP BY dow
) AS t USING (dow)
ORDER BY dow

panels.description: Chat id from **params** (`chat_id`, `ChatId`) and JSON **payload** (`ChatId`, `chat_id`). Rows with no id map to 0 and are excluded.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  chat_id,
  count() AS events,
  uniqExactIf(user_id, user_id > 0) AS users,
  uniqExact(module) AS modules,
  round(count() / greatest(uniqExactIf(user_id, user_id > 0), 1), 1) AS events_per_user
FROM (
  SELECT
    user_id,
    module,
    greatest(
  toInt64OrZero(params['chat_id']),
  toInt64OrZero(params['ChatId']),
  toInt64OrZero(JSONExtractString(payload, 'ChatId')),
  toInt64OrZero(JSONExtractString(payload, 'chat_id'))
) AS chat_id
  FROM cazinoshiz.events_v2
  WHERE project = 'cazinoshiz'
    AND $__timeFilter(created_at)
    AND NOT startsWith(event_type, '_')
)
WHERE chat_id != 0
GROUP BY chat_id
ORDER BY events DESC
LIMIT 50

panels.title: Per-chat leaderboard (from event params)

panels.description: Same chat resolution as per-chat leaderboard (params + payload JSON).

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  concat('chat ', toString(chat_id)) AS chat_label,
  toFloat64(count()) AS events
FROM (
  SELECT
    greatest(
  toInt64OrZero(params['chat_id']),
  toInt64OrZero(params['ChatId']),
  toInt64OrZero(JSONExtractString(payload, 'ChatId')),
  toInt64OrZero(JSONExtractString(payload, 'chat_id'))
) AS chat_id
  FROM cazinoshiz.events_v2
  WHERE project = 'cazinoshiz'
    AND $__timeFilter(created_at)
    AND NOT startsWith(event_type, '_')
)
WHERE chat_id != 0
GROUP BY chat_id
ORDER BY events DESC
LIMIT 22

panels.title: Top chats by events (bar)

panels.description: Top **10** chats by tagged event volume in the range; one line per chat (15m buckets).

targets.rawSql:
WITH top_ids AS (
  SELECT cid
  FROM (
    SELECT
      if(
        toInt64OrZero(params['chat_id']) != 0,
        toInt64OrZero(params['chat_id']),
        toInt64OrZero(params['ChatId'])
      ) AS cid,
      count() AS c
    FROM cazinoshiz.events_v2
    WHERE project = 'cazinoshiz'
      AND $__timeFilter(created_at)
      AND NOT startsWith(event_type, '_')
    GROUP BY cid
    HAVING cid != 0
    ORDER BY c DESC
    LIMIT 10
  )
)
SELECT
  toStartOfInterval(e.created_at, INTERVAL 15 MINUTE) AS time,
  concat('chat ', toString(e.cid)) AS chat_key,
  count() AS count
FROM (
  SELECT
    created_at,
    if(
      toInt64OrZero(params['chat_id']) != 0,
      toInt64OrZero(params['chat_id']),
      toInt64OrZero(params['ChatId'])
    ) AS cid
  FROM cazinoshiz.events_v2
  WHERE project = 'cazinoshiz'
    AND $__timeFilter(created_at)
    AND NOT startsWith(event_type, '_')
) AS e
WHERE e.cid IN (SELECT cid FROM top_ids)
GROUP BY time, e.cid
ORDER BY time

panels.description: Per-user **total events** in the range (all games), grouped into bands. Shows how intensively users engage overall.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  concat(toString(lo), '–', toString(hi), ' events') AS events_band,
  toFloat64(users) AS users_in_band
FROM (
  SELECT
    intDiv(cnt, 10) * 10 AS lo,
    intDiv(cnt, 10) * 10 + 9 AS hi,
    count() AS users
  FROM (
    SELECT user_id, count() AS cnt
    FROM cazinoshiz.events_v2
    WHERE project = 'cazinoshiz'
      AND $__timeFilter(created_at)
      AND NOT startsWith(event_type, '_')
      AND user_id > 0
    GROUP BY user_id
  )
  GROUP BY lo
  ORDER BY lo
)

panels.description: One row per **user_id**. Columns are **event counts** by `module` (game) in the dashboard range. **other** = modules not in the fixed list. Sort by **total_events**; scroll vertically — panel height uses most of the viewport.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  user_id,
  count() AS total_events,
  uniqExact(module) AS games_nr,
  countIf(module = 'admin') AS admin,
  countIf(module = 'basketball') AS basketball,
  countIf(module = 'blackjack') AS blackjack,
  countIf(module = 'bowling') AS bowling,
  countIf(module = 'challenges') AS challenges,
  countIf(module = 'darts') AS darts,
  countIf(module = 'dice') AS dice,
  countIf(module = 'dicecube') AS dicecube,
  countIf(module = 'football') AS football,
  countIf(module = 'horse') AS horse,
  countIf(module = 'pick') AS pick,
  countIf(module = 'poker') AS poker,
  countIf(module = 'redeem') AS redeem,
  countIf(module = 'sh') AS sh,
  countIf(module = 'transfer') AS transfer,
  countIf(module NOT IN ('admin','basketball','blackjack','bowling','challenges','darts','dice','dicecube','football','horse','pick','poker','redeem','sh','transfer')) AS other
FROM cazinoshiz.events_v2
WHERE project = 'cazinoshiz'
  AND $__timeFilter(created_at)
  AND NOT startsWith(event_type, '_')
  AND user_id > 0
GROUP BY user_id
ORDER BY total_events DESC
LIMIT 250

panels.title: Each user × game event counts (heatmap-style cells)

panels.description: Uses **Drill-down user** (top of dashboard). If nothing is selected, shows the **most active user** in the range. Counts use the dashboard time range only.

targets.rawSql:
WITH
  fu AS (
    SELECT replaceAll(replaceAll('${focus_user}', '''', ''), '"', '') AS raw
  ),
  parsed AS (
    SELECT multiIf(
      length(trim(fu.raw)) = 0 OR fu.raw = 'null', toInt64(0),
      match(fu.raw, '^[0-9]+$'), toInt64OrZero(fu.raw),
      toInt64OrZero(arrayElement(extractAll(fu.raw, '[0-9]+'), 1))
    ) AS id
    FROM fu
  ),
  fb AS (
    SELECT user_id
    FROM cazinoshiz.events_v2
    WHERE project = 'cazinoshiz'
      AND $__timeFilter(created_at)
      AND NOT startsWith(event_type, '_')
    GROUP BY user_id
    ORDER BY count() DESC
    LIMIT 1
  ),
  uid AS (
    SELECT if(
      (SELECT id FROM parsed) = 0,
      ifNull((SELECT user_id FROM fb), toInt64(0)),
      (SELECT id FROM parsed)
    ) AS v
  )
SELECT
  module,
  toFloat64(count()) AS events
FROM cazinoshiz.events_v2
WHERE project = 'cazinoshiz'
  AND $__timeFilter(created_at)
  AND NOT startsWith(event_type, '_')
  AND user_id = (SELECT v FROM uid)
GROUP BY module
ORDER BY events DESC

panels.description: Rows where `params` carries Bet/Amount/Payout/Prize (mini-games + settlements). **Net** = wagered − paid_out (house view, range totals).

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  sum(toInt64OrZero(params['Bet']) + toInt64OrZero(params['Amount'])) AS wagered,
  sum(toInt64OrZero(params['Payout']) + toInt64OrZero(params['Prize'])) AS paid_out,
  wagered - paid_out AS house_edge_coins
FROM cazinoshiz.events_v2
WHERE project = 'cazinoshiz'
  AND $__timeFilter(created_at)
  AND (
    toInt64OrZero(params['Bet']) + toInt64OrZero(params['Amount'])
    + toInt64OrZero(params['Payout']) + toInt64OrZero(params['Prize'])
  ) > 0

panels.title: Coins flow (params, range)

panels.description: Hourly sums from the same money-tagged rows.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  toStartOfInterval(created_at, INTERVAL 1 HOUR) AS time,
  sum(toInt64OrZero(params['Bet']) + toInt64OrZero(params['Amount'])) AS wagered,
  sum(toInt64OrZero(params['Payout']) + toInt64OrZero(params['Prize'])) AS paid_out
FROM cazinoshiz.events_v2
WHERE project = 'cazinoshiz'
  AND $__timeFilter(created_at)
  AND (
    toInt64OrZero(params['Bet']) + toInt64OrZero(params['Amount'])
    + toInt64OrZero(params['Payout']) + toInt64OrZero(params['Prize'])
  ) > 0
GROUP BY time
ORDER BY time

panels.title: Coins wagered vs paid (hourly)

panels.description: **framework** = `event_type` starting with `_`. **host** = `module` host / `host.` prefix. **product** = everything else.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  toStartOfInterval(created_at, INTERVAL 5 MINUTE) AS time,
  multiIf(
    startsWith(event_type, '_'),
    'framework',
    module = 'host' OR startsWith(event_type, 'host.'),
    'host',
    'product'
  ) AS traffic_bucket,
  count() AS events
FROM cazinoshiz.events_v2
WHERE project = 'cazinoshiz'
  AND $__timeFilter(created_at)
GROUP BY time, traffic_bucket
ORDER BY time

panels.description: Domain-style completed rounds / race (`event_type` suffix). Coins = **Payout+Prize** from params.

SELECT

  module,
  sum(toInt64OrZero(params['Payout']) + toInt64OrZero(params['Prize'])) AS coins_won,
  count() AS rounds
FROM cazinoshiz.events_v2
WHERE project = 'cazinoshiz'
  AND $__timeFilter(created_at)
  AND user_id > 0
  AND event_type IN (
    'darts.throw_completed',
    'football.throw_completed',

    'bowling.roll_completed',
    'dicecube.roll_completed',

panels.title: Heavy multi-game hours (per user)

panels.description: **first_at** = first analytics row per user (product only, `user_id > 0`). **New** = first_at inside the dashboard range. **Returning** = active in range but first_seen before the range. Table scans user-level mins — acceptable for analytics volumes.

targets.rawSql:
WITH
  fs AS (
    SELECT user_id, min(created_at) AS first_at
    FROM cazinoshiz.events_v2
    WHERE project = 'cazinoshiz' AND NOT startsWith(event_type, '_') AND user_id > 0
    GROUP BY user_id
  ),
  act AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT user_id
    FROM cazinoshiz.events_v2
    WHERE project = 'cazinoshiz' AND $__timeFilter(created_at) AND NOT startsWith(event_type, '_') AND user_id > 0
  )
SELECT
  uniqExactIf(a.user_id, $__timeFilter(fs.first_at)) AS new_users,
  uniqExact(a.user_id) - uniqExactIf(a.user_id, $__timeFilter(fs.first_at)) AS returning_users,
  uniqExact(a.user_id) AS active_users,
  round(if(uniqExact(a.user_id) = 0, 0, 100.0 * uniqExactIf(a.user_id, $__timeFilter(fs.first_at)) / uniqExact(a.user_id)), 2) AS new_user_share_pct
FROM act a
INNER JOIN fs USING (user_id)

panels.description: Money-tagged rows (`Bet`/`Amount`/`Payout`/`Prize`) by **module**.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  module,
  sum(toInt64OrZero(params['Bet']) + toInt64OrZero(params['Amount'])) AS wagered,
  sum(toInt64OrZero(params['Payout']) + toInt64OrZero(params['Prize'])) AS paid_out,
  sum(toInt64OrZero(params['Bet']) + toInt64OrZero(params['Amount'])) - sum(toInt64OrZero(params['Payout']) + toInt64OrZero(params['Prize'])) AS house_edge,
  count() AS money_rows
FROM cazinoshiz.events_v2
WHERE project = 'cazinoshiz'
  AND $__timeFilter(created_at)
  AND (
    toInt64OrZero(params['Bet']) + toInt64OrZero(params['Amount'])
    + toInt64OrZero(params['Payout']) + toInt64OrZero(params['Prize'])
  ) > 0
GROUP BY module
ORDER BY house_edge DESC
LIMIT 40

panels.description: Product events only. **Week** = `toStartOfWeek(..., 1, 'UTC')` (Monday 00:00 UTC). **Top 15** `module` rows per week by event count.

targets.rawSql:
WITH agg AS (
  SELECT
    toStartOfWeek(created_at, 1, 'UTC') AS week_start,
    module,
    count() AS events,
    uniqExactIf(user_id, user_id > 0) AS active_users
  FROM cazinoshiz.events_v2
  WHERE project = 'cazinoshiz'
    AND $__timeFilter(created_at)
    AND NOT startsWith(event_type, '_')
  GROUP BY week_start, module
),
rk AS (
  SELECT
    week_start,
    module,
    events,
    active_users,
    row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY week_start ORDER BY events DESC, module ASC) AS rank
  FROM agg
)
SELECT week_start, rank, module, events, active_users
FROM rk
WHERE rank <= 15
ORDER BY week_start DESC, rank ASC

panels.title: Top 15 tagged chats / week

panels.description: Cohort = UTC week of **first** product event per `user_id`. **wN_pct** = % of that cohort with ≥1 product event in the N-th calendar week after cohort week (w0 = same week).

targets.rawSql:
WITH
  fs AS (
    SELECT
      user_id,
      toStartOfWeek(min(created_at), 1, 'UTC') AS cohort_week
    FROM cazinoshiz.events_v2
    WHERE project = 'cazinoshiz'
      AND NOT startsWith(event_type, '_')
      AND user_id > 0
    GROUP BY user_id
  ),
  cohorts AS (
    SELECT cohort_week, count() AS cohort_size
    FROM fs
    WHERE $__timeFilter(cohort_week)
    GROUP BY cohort_week
  ),
  uw AS (
    SELECT user_id, toStartOfWeek(created_at, 1, 'UTC') AS w
    FROM cazinoshiz.events_v2
    WHERE project = 'cazinoshiz'
      AND NOT startsWith(event_type, '_')
      AND user_id > 0
    GROUP BY user_id, w
  ),
  j AS (
    SELECT
      fs.cohort_week,
      fs.user_id,
      dateDiff('week', fs.cohort_week, uw.w) AS k
    FROM fs
    INNER JOIN uw ON fs.user_id = uw.user_id
    WHERE uw.w >= fs.cohort_week
      AND dateDiff('week', fs.cohort_week, uw.w) >= 0
      AND dateDiff('week', fs.cohort_week, uw.w) <= 8
  )
SELECT
  c.cohort_week,
  c.cohort_size,
  round(if(c.cohort_size = 0, 0, 100.0 * uniqExactIf(j.user_id, j.k = 0) / c.cohort_size), 1) AS w0_pct,
  round(if(c.cohort_size = 0, 0, 100.0 * uniqExactIf(j.user_id, j.k = 1) / c.cohort_size), 1) AS w1_pct,
  round(if(c.cohort_size = 0, 0, 100.0 * uniqExactIf(j.user_id, j.k = 2) / c.cohort_size), 1) AS w2_pct,
  round(if(c.cohort_size = 0, 0, 100.0 * uniqExactIf(j.user_id, j.k = 3) / c.cohort_size), 1) AS w3_pct,
  round(if(c.cohort_size = 0, 0, 100.0 * uniqExactIf(j.user_id, j.k = 4) / c.cohort_size), 1) AS w4_pct,
  round(if(c.cohort_size = 0, 0, 100.0 * uniqExactIf(j.user_id, j.k = 5) / c.cohort_size), 1) AS w5_pct,
  round(if(c.cohort_size = 0, 0, 100.0 * uniqExactIf(j.user_id, j.k = 6) / c.cohort_size), 1) AS w6_pct,
  round(if(c.cohort_size = 0, 0, 100.0 * uniqExactIf(j.user_id, j.k = 7) / c.cohort_size), 1) AS w7_pct,
  round(if(c.cohort_size = 0, 0, 100.0 * uniqExactIf(j.user_id, j.k = 8) / c.cohort_size), 1) AS w8_pct
FROM cohorts c
LEFT JOIN j ON j.cohort_week = c.cohort_week
GROUP BY c.cohort_week, c.cohort_size
ORDER BY c.cohort_week DESC

panels.title: Weekly cohort retention (product users, UTC)

panels.description: **Same-game** steps only: % of users who did **from** who also did **to** in the range. Not a global product funnel.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT from_step, to_step, users_from, users_both, round(if(users_from = 0, 0, 100.0 * users_both / users_from), 1) AS conversion_pct FROM (
  SELECT 'darts.bet' AS from_step, 'darts.throw' AS to_step, c.uf AS users_from, c.ub AS users_both FROM (SELECT (SELECT uniqExact(user_id) FROM cazinoshiz.events_v2 WHERE project = 'cazinoshiz' AND $__timeFilter(created_at) AND user_id > 0 AND event_type = 'darts.bet') AS uf, (SELECT uniqExact(b.user_id) FROM (SELECT user_id FROM cazinoshiz.events_v2 WHERE project = 'cazinoshiz' AND $__timeFilter(created_at) AND user_id > 0 AND event_type = 'darts.bet' GROUP BY user_id) AS b INNER JOIN (SELECT user_id FROM cazinoshiz.events_v2 WHERE project = 'cazinoshiz' AND $__timeFilter(created_at) AND user_id > 0 AND event_type = 'darts.throw' GROUP BY user_id) AS t ON b.user_id = t.user_id) AS ub) AS c
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'dicecube.bet', 'dicecube.roll', c.uf, c.ub FROM (SELECT (SELECT uniqExact(user_id) FROM cazinoshiz.events_v2 WHERE project = 'cazinoshiz' AND $__timeFilter(created_at) AND user_id > 0 AND event_type = 'dicecube.bet') AS uf, (SELECT uniqExact(b.user_id) FROM (SELECT user_id FROM cazinoshiz.events_v2 WHERE project = 'cazinoshiz' AND $__timeFilter(created_at) AND user_id > 0 AND event_type = 'dicecube.bet' GROUP BY user_id) AS b INNER JOIN (SELECT user_id FROM cazinoshiz.events_v2 WHERE project = 'cazinoshiz' AND $__timeFilter(created_at) AND user_id > 0 AND event_type = 'dicecube.roll' GROUP BY user_id) AS t ON b.user_id = t.user_id) AS ub) AS c
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'blackjack.start', 'blackjack.end', c.uf, c.ub FROM (SELECT (SELECT uniqExact(user_id) FROM cazinoshiz.events_v2 WHERE project = 'cazinoshiz' AND $__timeFilter(created_at) AND user_id > 0 AND event_type = 'blackjack.start') AS uf, (SELECT uniqExact(b.user_id) FROM (SELECT user_id FROM cazinoshiz.events_v2 WHERE project = 'cazinoshiz' AND $__timeFilter(created_at) AND user_id > 0 AND event_type = 'blackjack.start' GROUP BY user_id) AS b INNER JOIN (SELECT user_id FROM cazinoshiz.events_v2 WHERE project = 'cazinoshiz' AND $__timeFilter(created_at) AND user_id > 0 AND event_type = 'blackjack.end' GROUP BY user_id) AS t ON b.user_id = t.user_id) AS ub) AS c

panels.description: Histogram of wager size on money rows (`Bet`+`Amount` > 0).

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  multiIf(
    stake <= 10, '1–10',
    stake <= 50, '11–50',
    stake <= 100, '51–100',
    stake <= 500, '101–500',
    stake <= 1000, '501–1k',
    stake <= 5000, '1k–5k',
    '>5k'
  ) AS stake_bucket,
  multiIf(
    stake <= 10, 1,
    stake <= 50, 2,
    stake <= 100, 3,
    stake <= 500, 4,
    stake <= 1000, 5,
    stake <= 5000, 6,
    7
  ) AS ord,
  toFloat64(count()) AS rows
FROM (
  SELECT toInt64OrZero(params['Bet']) + toInt64OrZero(params['Amount']) AS stake
  FROM cazinoshiz.events_v2
  WHERE project = 'cazinoshiz'
    AND $__timeFilter(created_at)
    AND (toInt64OrZero(params['Bet']) + toInt64OrZero(params['Amount'])) > 0
)
GROUP BY stake_bucket, ord
ORDER BY ord

panels.description: Lines for **Weekly cohort retention** (w1–w4).

targets.rawSql:
WITH
  fs AS (
    SELECT user_id, toStartOfWeek(min(created_at), 1, 'UTC') AS cohort_week
    FROM cazinoshiz.events_v2
    WHERE project = 'cazinoshiz' AND NOT startsWith(event_type, '_') AND user_id > 0
    GROUP BY user_id
  ),
  cohorts AS (
    SELECT cohort_week, count() AS cohort_size
    FROM fs
    WHERE $__timeFilter(cohort_week)
    GROUP BY cohort_week
  ),
  uw AS (
    SELECT user_id, toStartOfWeek(created_at, 1, 'UTC') AS w
    FROM cazinoshiz.events_v2
    WHERE project = 'cazinoshiz' AND NOT startsWith(event_type, '_') AND user_id > 0
    GROUP BY user_id, w
  ),
  j AS (
    SELECT fs.cohort_week, fs.user_id, dateDiff('week', fs.cohort_week, uw.w) AS k
    FROM fs
    INNER JOIN uw ON fs.user_id = uw.user_id
    WHERE uw.w >= fs.cohort_week
      AND dateDiff('week', fs.cohort_week, uw.w) BETWEEN 0 AND 8
  )
SELECT
  c.cohort_week AS time,
  round(if(c.cohort_size = 0, 0, 100.0 * uniqExactIf(j.user_id, j.k = 1) / c.cohort_size), 1) AS w1_retention_pct,
  round(if(c.cohort_size = 0, 0, 100.0 * uniqExactIf(j.user_id, j.k = 2) / c.cohort_size), 1) AS w2_retention_pct,
  round(if(c.cohort_size = 0, 0, 100.0 * uniqExactIf(j.user_id, j.k = 3) / c.cohort_size), 1) AS w3_retention_pct,
  round(if(c.cohort_size = 0, 0, 100.0 * uniqExactIf(j.user_id, j.k = 4) / c.cohort_size), 1) AS w4_retention_pct
FROM cohorts c
LEFT JOIN j ON j.cohort_week = c.cohort_week
GROUP BY c.cohort_week, c.cohort_size
ORDER BY time

  uniqExactIf(user_id, user_id > 0) AS users
FROM cazinoshiz.events_v2
WHERE project = 'cazinoshiz' AND $__timeFilter(created_at)
GROUP BY time
ORDER BY time

panels.description: Bar for **Top wagerers by user × module** — summed `coins_wagered` per user across modules.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT toString(user_id) AS label, toFloat64(sum(coins_wagered)) AS coins_wagered
FROM (
  SELECT user_id, module,
    sum(toInt64OrZero(params['Bet']) + toInt64OrZero(params['Amount'])) AS coins_wagered
  FROM cazinoshiz.events_v2
  WHERE project = 'cazinoshiz'
    AND $__timeFilter(created_at)
    AND user_id > 0
    AND (
      toInt64OrZero(params['Bet']) + toInt64OrZero(params['Amount'])
      + toInt64OrZero(params['Payout']) + toInt64OrZero(params['Prize'])
    ) > 0
  GROUP BY user_id, module
)
GROUP BY user_id
ORDER BY coins_wagered DESC
LIMIT 24

targets.rawSql: SELECT toStartOfInterval(created_at, INTERVAL 1 MINUTE) AS time, sum(if(event_type = 'daily.bonus', toInt32OrZero(params['amount']), 0)) as Faucets, -sum(if(event_type IN ('pick.lottery.settled', 'pick.daily.settled', 'challenges.completed', 'dice.prize', 'dicecube.payout'), toInt32OrZero(params['fee']), 0)) as Sinks FROM cazinoshiz.events_v2 WHERE project = 'cazinoshiz' AND $__timeFilter(created_at) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT toStartOfInterval(created_at, INTERVAL 1 MINUTE) AS time, sum(toInt32OrZero(params['net'])) as Volume FROM cazinoshiz.events_v2 WHERE project = 'cazinoshiz' AND event_type = 'transfer.completed' AND $__timeFilter(created_at) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT toStartOfInterval(created_at, INTERVAL 1 MINUTE) AS time, sum(if(event_type='pick.lottery.settled', toInt32OrZero(params['pot']), 0)) as RegularLottery, sum(if(event_type='pick.daily.settled', toInt32OrZero(params['pot']), 0)) as DailyLottery FROM cazinoshiz.events_v2 WHERE project = 'cazinoshiz' AND event_type IN ('pick.lottery.settled', 'pick.daily.settled') AND $__timeFilter(created_at) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT
  params['game'] AS Game,
  count() AS TotalDuels,
  sum(if(params['winner_id'] = params['challenger_id'], 1, 0)) AS ChallengerWins,
  sum(if(params['winner_id'] = params['target_id'], 1, 0)) AS TargetWins,
  round(100.0 * sum(if(params['winner_id'] = params['challenger_id'], 1, 0)) / count(), 1) AS ChallengerWinPct,
  round(100.0 * sum(if(params['winner_id'] = params['target_id'], 1, 0)) / count(), 1) AS TargetWinPct
FROM cazinoshiz.events_v2
WHERE project = 'cazinoshiz' AND event_type = 'challenges.completed' AND $__timeFilter(created_at)
GROUP BY Game
ORDER BY TotalDuels DESC
